item.title: FYI, Siri is now using all your apps to learn from unless you manually unselect it
item.description: I don’t even have Siri active and it was all toggled on. Passwords, banking apps, messages, everything!
item.dc:creator: sureasyourebornyourenevergoingtoseenounicorn

item.title: Batman
item.description: Found this a couple of years ago. Updated the number for 2024. They initially had the number of 492, so I surmised they were actually referring to the U.S. not the actual planet, so the updated number reflects that, their intent. There are over 2,000 globally.
